items.title: Iraqi soccer fans celebrate the end of their 40 year World Cup drought
items.desc: The Iraq national men's team hasn't played a World Cup in 40 years; a drought that ends Tuesday night, to the excitement of soccer fans in Dearborn, Michigan, home to a large Iraqi diaspora.
